/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/detail/num__description.c.o CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/detail/num__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/detail/num__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
